name: Evanston Firemens
description_short: Evanston Firemens Credit Union is a financial institution based in Illinois offering banking services including savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates, and mortgage loans.
description_long: Evanston Firemens Credit Union is a credit union headquartered at 702 Madison Street in Evanston, Illinois. As a member-owned financial cooperative, it operates within the credit union system regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). The institution has established itself in the Evanston community and provides traditional banking services to its members. The credit union offers a range of deposit and lending products including savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates (CDs) in multiple terms, and mortgage financing. According to MonitorBankRates data from April 2026, they provide 12-month share certificates, 6-month certificates, 3-month certificates, standard savings accounts, money market accounts, and 30-year fixed mortgage loans. Members can access these products either through their physical branch location or potentially through online banking platforms. Evanston Firemens Credit Union distinguishes itself through its exceptional financial stability ratings. The institution earned a 5.0 star rating (exceptional) from MonitorBankRates and an A+ overall health grade with a perfect score of 100/100, indicating strong capitalization and asset quality. This high safety rating suggests the credit union maintains robust reserves and operates with conservative lending practices that protect member deposits. While the credit union maintains strong financial health metrics, the available data shows limited current rate information on the review website, with rates not actively displayed at the time of this profile creation. Prospective members should verify current offerings directly with the institution, as deposit rates and mortgage terms fluctuate with market conditions. The credit union appears to serve a specific membership base given its Evanston location and traditional banking focus.
pros: A+ overall health grade with 100/100 score from MonitorBankRates indicates exceptional financial stability
5.0 star rating (exceptional) reflects strong capitalization and member satisfaction metrics
Offers multiple CD term options including 12-month, 6-month, and 3-month share certificates
Provides mortgage lending services with 30-year fixed rate options
Member-owned credit union structure aligns member and institution interests
Regulated by NCUA with comprehensive safety oversight
Established physical branch location in Evanston for in-person banking
cons: Current rates are not actively displayed on MonitorBankRates, requiring direct contact with the institution for specific offerings
Limited online information available about product details, fees, and membership eligibility requirements
Texas Ratio data not available, preventing full financial comparison analysis
Geographic limitation to Evanston area may restrict membership access for non-local consumers
No clear information about digital banking capabilities or mobile app availability
best_for: Evanston, Illinois residents seeking a locally-based credit union with strong financial stability
Members prioritizing financial institution safety and conservative banking practices
Consumers looking for traditional banking products including CDs and mortgages from a highly-rated institution
diagnosis: Evanston Firemens Credit Union is best suited for Evanston-area residents and existing members seeking a financially stable, member-owned alternative to traditional banks for deposit and basic lending services. The main caveat is that current rate and product information is limited online; prospective members must contact the credit union directly at their Madison Street branch to verify current offerings, eligibility, and terms.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Evanston Firemens Credit Union is an Illinois-based credit union offering savings accounts, money market accounts, and mortgages.
